title: Instrument Driver Outer Panel Removal and Installation

blocks.text: Instrument Driver Outer Panel Removal and Installation
1. Audio panel removal (for vehicles equipped with audio system)

refs.label: Audio panel removal (for vehicles equipped with audio system)

blocks.text: 2. Center panel removal (for vehicles not equipped with audio system)

refs.label: Center panel removal (for vehicles not equipped with audio system)

blocks.text: Pry on part (B) of the driver outer panel (A) to create a gap between the driver outer panel and the instrument panel (C). Remove the hooks (D) and (E) in this order, and remove the driver outer panel.
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
